title: Mencari Arah di Jalan
opening: Permisi, ada yang bisa saya bantu?

t1.prompt: Oh, Museum Nasional. Dari sini Anda tinggal lurus saja sekitar dua ratus meter, nanti ada perempatan besar, belok kiri.
t1.promptTranslation: Oh, the Museum Nasional (National Museum). From here, just go lurus saja (straight) for about two hundred meters, then there's a perempatan besar (big intersection), belok kiri (turn left).

t2_distance.prompt: Tidak terlalu jauh kok, sekitar 5-7 menit jalan kaki. Kalau naik ojek mungkin cuma 2 menit.
t2_distance.promptTranslation: It's not too far, about 5-7 minutes walk. If you take a motorcycle taxi, maybe only 2 minutes.

t2_landmark.prompt: Setelah belok kiri di perempatan itu, Anda akan melihat gedung berwarna merah dengan logo besar Bank XYZ di sebelah kanan jalan. Museumnya persis di seberang Bank XYZ itu.
t2_landmark.promptTranslation: After belok kiri (turning left) at that intersection, you will see a gedung berwarna merah (red building) with a large Bank XYZ logo on the sebelah kanan jalan (right side of the road). The museum is persis di seberang (exactly opposite) Bank XYZ.

t2_transport.prompt: Kalau mau cepat, Anda bisa naik TransJakarta dari halte di seberang sana, turun di halte Monas. Dari situ tinggal jalan sedikit ke Museum Nasional. Atau pakai ojek online juga gampang.
t2_transport.promptTranslation: If you want to be fast, you can take TransJakarta from the halte (bus stop) across the street, turun (get off) at Monas stop. From there it's just a short walk to the National Museum. Or using ojek online (online motorcycle taxi) is also easy.

t3_nearby_places.prompt: Tentu, di sekitar sana ada banyak warung makan dan juga kafe kekinian. Anda bisa coba cari di aplikasi peta.
t3_nearby_places.promptTranslation: Of course, around there are many food stalls and also trendy cafes. You can try searching on a map app.

t3_bus_details.prompt: Untuk ke halte Monas, Anda bisa naik koridor 1 atau 2. Halte di seberang sana ada petugas yang bisa membantu.
t3_bus_details.promptTranslation: To Monas bus stop, you can take corridor 1 or 2. There's an officer at the bus stop across the street who can help.

t4_specific_recommendation.prompt: Ada banyak kafe di Jalan Sabang yang populer, tidak jauh dari sana. Anda bisa coba cari di sana.
t4_specific_recommendation.promptTranslation: There are many popular cafes on Sabang Street, not far from there. You can try looking there.

t4_officer_location.prompt: Biasanya mereka berdiri di dekat pintu masuk atau di dalam halte. Cukup cari seragam warna biru atau merah TransJakarta.
t4_officer_location.promptTranslation: Usually they stand near the entrance or inside the bus stop. Just look for the blue or red TransJakarta uniform.

t-repeat.prompt: Maaf, bisa diulang? Kurang jelas tadi.
t-repeat.promptTranslation: Sorry, can you repeat? It wasn't clear earlier.

t-end.promptTranslation: You're welcome. Hope you have a pleasant journey!
